Notice Of Motion To Compel Mental Examination Of Plaintiff Don Roberts And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-01-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Court reporter: Barrie Hart, CSR #6954, 415-328-6644, Reported, (501).
No other Appearance.

The matter is called twice. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT DOROTHY DAY COMMUNITY, LP, LARISSA ABRAMOVA, MERCY HOUSING MANAGEMENT GROUP, INC. Notice Of Motion To Compel Mental Examination Of Plaintiff Don Roberts And Request For Sanctions is GRANTED. Request for sanctions is DENIED. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Barrie Hart, CSR #6954, 415-328-6644, Reported, (501).

Defendants Notice Of Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Deposition, Production Of Documents, And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-01-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Court reporter: Barrie Hart, CSR #6954, 415-328-6644, Reported, (501).
No other Appearance.

The matter is called twice. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT DOROTHY DAY COMMUNITY, LP, LARISSA ABRAMOVA, MERCY HOUSING MANAGEMENT GROUP, INC. Defendants Notice Of Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Deposition, Production Of Documents, And Request For Sanctions is GRANTED. Parties to meet and confer regarding the deposition date. Plaintiff to obtain all Plaintiff's medical and mental health records from his providers, date stamp them and then to produce the relevant ones at his deposition. Sanctions granted in the amount of $870.70 within 5 days. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Barrie Hart, CSR #6954, 415-328-6644, Reported, (501).
